app.subtitle: Information Management
inicio.systemSubtitle: Summary indicators for registered farms, hectares and varieties in Olmos.
inicio.coverDesc: Inspections, traceability and reports for grape, blueberry, asparagus and avocado in one platform.
inicio.coverInsightNote: Analyzed reports are loaded from external files - WULTU.
inicio.title: Your quality platform in Olmos
inicio.description: Inspections, traceability and reports for grape, blueberry, asparagus and avocado — all in one place.
inicio.gisSubtitle: GIS view of blueberry parcels by variety and stage.
inicio.chartFiltersHint: Use each chart filter to view by stage or farm without changing the crop.
inicio.tablesSubtitle: Select a farm to view crop, stage, field, variety and area in hectares.
inicio.cropNoData: This crop has no hectare records yet. Update presentation/data/cultivos-hectareas.json when data is available.
inicio.tableFilterPlaceholder: Filter crop, stage, field or variety…
inicio.tableNoResults: No parcels match the current filter.
inicio.feature1Desc: Automate report reading and consolidation to accelerate operational decisions.
inicio.feature2Desc: Complete tracking of lots, inspections, and incidents from field to export.
inicio.feature3Desc: Executive indicators and trends to measure efficiency before and after the system.

dashboard.verticalFarmingDesc: Quality monitoring in vertical farming systems to optimize yield, traceability and packing plant inspection.

plagasArandano.errorXlsxLibrary: Could not load the Excel reader. Reload the page and try again.
plagasArandano.errorColumns: Blueberry Pests Excel must have {{count}} columns
plagasArandano.errorArchivoVacio: The Excel file is empty or does not match the Blueberry Pests format.
plagasArandano.errorArchivoInvalido: Invalid header value. Expected {{esperado}} but found {{encontrado}}.
plagasArandano.errorGrupoCabecera: Row 4 group must be PMPAR. Found: {{encontrado}}.
plagasArandano.errorEstadoCabecera: The file must be in ENVIADA status. Found: {{encontrado}}.
plagasArandano.errorCartilla: File is not Blueberry Pests. Expected {{cartilla}} in column B but found {{encontrado}}.
plagasArandano.harvestAfterInspection: Harvest date is later than inspection date
plagasArandano.ruleSampleNumeric: Must be 500 grams (numeric or General format only)
plagasArandano.ruleTgFormat: Invalid format. Must be TG##-######## (e.g. TG16-00002196)
plagasArandano.ruleDigitEmpty: Empty field — must be a digit 0–9
plagasArandano.tipSample500: Must be exactly 500 grams (numeric or General)
plagasArandano.noErrorsOnInspection: No errors found for this inspection
